key_needs: Chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper
Avoid: shellfish, beef, pork, soy, tofu, cow’s milk
Prioritize essentials; flag if total may exceed budget
summary: Budget is $120. Shopping is for a small dinner plus weekly basics; prioritize essentials first. Must-haves include chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper, fresh spinach (2 bags), cherry tomatoes, 4 avocados, brown rice (1 bag), olive oil (small bottle), dairy-free Greek yogurt (no cow’s milk), and unsweetened almond milk. Staples: black beans (4 cans), chickpeas (2 cans), medium salsa, oats (1 container). Household: paper towels, dish soap, kitchen-size trash bags. Dietary restrictions: avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, and cow’s milk. If projected total exceeds $120, call it out.
